display_text: Pig Pole, Cost: 0: A Neutral item that transforms your hero into a critter for 3 seconds and provides +20% movement speed. This can be used for repositioning, escaping, or initiating by turning into a small, fast-moving unit that is harder to target. Stats: CD: 20s, Duration: 3s, Movespeed Bonus: +20%.
